caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up, wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt, is recorded in a studio setting. She is seated behind a black microphone on a stand. In the background, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in red text, and a black door is marked "Employee Only." On-screen logos for "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" appear throughout the sequence. Across the frames, the woman is actively speaking and gesturing. Initially, she opens her left hand in an expansive gesture. She then brings her hand up to her face, touching her nose and mouth area. She momentarily closes her eyes and lowers her head while continuing to touch her face, before returning to an open-mouthed expression as she speaks into the microphone. The camera remains stationary, capturing her from the waist up against a neutral wall with a yellow vertical accent.
